TEMPERATURE
SUSAN SEEKS SEVEN SILVER SPOTS.
SHE SEES SIX SMALL SPOTS.
SUSAN SELLS SEVEN SPOTS.
SIX SPOTS STAY STILL.
SEVEN SPOTS START SPINNING.
SUSAN STOPS SPINNING SPOTS.
SIX SPOTS STOP SPINNING.
SUSAN SELLS SPOTS SLOWLY.
SIX SPOTS STAY STILL AGAIN.
SUSAN SEES SEVEN SPOTS.
SUSAN ROLL SPOTS SLOWLY.
SUSAN SELLS SPOTS SOON.
